_architecture_note: Joel Dickson prompt assembly. Core identity + directors notes for voice agent. Rich context loads contextually.

assembly_notes.voice_agent: Core identity (system prompt with speaking style + SSML) + directors notes (anti-AI-speak, humanization) + function calling. ~4500 tokens.
assembly_notes.full_context: Same as voice agent for Joel — directors notes are critical for voice quality.
assembly_notes.rich_context: Full context + biography for text-based or complex scenarios.
